errors.text: Its pretty good for right now, but not able to recomend for 1 reason. Content is very low.

Zerei Cyberpunk 2077 em 2020 e comprei o jogo agora em 2026 na Steam.
Mesmo com todo o trabalho da CDPR o produto continua sendo muito inferior ao prometido e bem abaixo de outros jogos mais recentes, como o próprio KCD2, jogos de menos investimento como BG3 e até o recente indie Tainted Grail Fall of Avalon.
São problemas estruturais de narrativa adolescent
G

I have been curious about the Monster Hunter Series for a while as I know many players who are fans are obsessed with it. When I tried the play this game during the open beta the optimization for was not good to say the least, but gladly can say that is not the case anymore, this game looks and runs incredible! The gameplay loop is what you come to this seri

recently i got really into cities skylines. ive had the game for years but ive only played 5 hours. the reason is that the games mechanics are quite complex and hard to understand. but that exact thing is also what got me hooked once i gave it another try, i got sucked in this week and spent 45 more hours on the game.
but the reason i even got a bit into it
el juego es bueno pero no me deja jugar online me sale que no me puedo unir a la sesión. R35A6-0-0:3
客观地说，不管是游戏内容还是画面都比一代有进步。就是优化还是不算好，人口一多模拟速度就低了。
[b]它甚至不愿意让我打开[/b]
Delete Nata from this game and my life shall be yours
trop adictif

Cities: Skylines 2 is a very fun and highly replayable city-building simulator. Thanks to a great variety of mods and frequent updates, the gameplay always feels fresh and there is always a reason to come back. Sadly, as with all games from this publisher, most of the new update content is hidden behind paid DLCs. Even if they are pretty cheap on their own,
这个好评是给所有坚持更新与完善都市天际线二的工作人员与玩家打的，有他们才能让这款游戏变得更好

アイテムが設置できるにもかかわらず削除しようとすると「アイテムが重なっています」と表示されどうやっても削除できなくなりました。アクセスできないオブジェクトが残り続けることを意味すると思うのでそれまでかけた時間を無駄にされた気分です。（自動セーブでも戻せなくなって終わりました。）
まだ序盤だったので軽微で済んだと考えられなくもないですが、発展が進んだ段階でこういった不具合に当たってしまう可能性を考えるとプレイする気が削がれます。

上記を気にされる方は設定で自動セーブの数を増やしておくか、定期的に別データとしてセーブしておくことをおすすめします。（特定のMODを入れることでオブジェクトを強制的に削除できるようですが、バニラでは無理でした。）

ゲーム内容自体は前作から大きく変わっている印象はないです。購入を検討さ

Pros: DEMOCRACY
Cons:
- I was roped into this game by peer pressure, which is bad and dangerous and a slippery slope. Actual friendslop game that makes me do terrible things like actually play with friends on a regular basis
- Stims have NO side effects. Intended affects include: sometimes stimming does not make you stim, some enemy corpses are not where
This game is buggier than Star Citizen, and thats saying something! :D
every patch somehow makes the game worse

Estou quase zerando esse jogo (to no ultimo capitulo da historia principal), e resumidamente esse jogo só vale a pena pela luta com os monstros.

A história dele é tenebrosa de ruim, é infantil, chata, repetitiva, enrolada e tem uma criança que fica a história inteira enchendo o saco, é muiiiiito chato, sério, recomendo que você pule todas as cenas de histór
